calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on THUR-JAN-31-2013:
Plaintiff POETT LLC is represented by David Levy who is present with Attorney Philip S. Keith
Defendants MICHAEL SCHARTON, JOHN RIGGS sued as Lars Vega, and RUBIN RION sued as Rubin Ryan are present with Attorney H. Allison Elmore representing the defendants though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem Elizabeth Riles, litigants, and respective counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is NOT filed. The trial date of FEB-04-2013 is vacated.
